title: Language Package Dependencies
completionNote: All six ecosystems (npm/pip/cargo/nuget/gem/go) ship install handlers in src/packages/. Final two added 2026-06-27: src/packages/gem.rs (`gem install --no-document <name> [-v <ver>]`) and src/packages/go.rs (`go install <module>@<version>`). Both wired into PackagesConfigRef, install_packages dispatcher, Config struct, TOP_LEVEL_SECTIONS, validate_package_section, and run_packages_phase telemetry. GEM_KNOBS / GO_KNOBS slices pinned by destructure tests. Per-package name + version validation (control bytes, flag-like names, URL schemes) inherits from common.rs. Unit tests pass for both handlers including argv contract and flag-like-name refusal.
